title: orthopenthea obtusa
intro: Orthopenthea obtusa, also known as the Obtuse-leafed Orthopenthea, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Orthopenthea obtusa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even exhibit anticancer properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
